name: PFCard
description: Reusable content surface with header, body, and optional footer.
responsibility: Contain one focused unit of information or action.

requirements: Interactive cards must expose a keyboard focus indicator.
Headers must remain readable and structured.
Selectable cards must expose programmatic state.

composition_rules: Use one card for one coherent information cluster.
Use PFMetricCard instead of PFCard when the primary purpose is numeric instrumentation.
Optional footer actions must remain secondary to the card body purpose.
